note: Every ML prediction is produced by a model trained with that run removed.
Feature list excludes run, event number, current, group, downstream label, and n-selected.
Random row split is expected to be optimistic; compare with run-held-out weak-current AUC.
Flagged if the current classifier is implausibly separable under run holdout.
Large row-split advantage would indicate run/row leakage sensitivity.
Flagged if the synthetic pile-up score almost directly predicts the downstream occupancy label.
